name: saeed
description: SAEED (سعيد) — Self-Advancing Elite Engineering Directorate. A self-improving team of 54 specialist Claude Code subagents spanning architecture, web + native iOS/Android/macOS, backend, databases, AI/RAG, GPU/AI-systems, networking, security, DevOps, design, QA, and bilingual (Arabic/English) delivery — with a micro-managing boss, an HR lead that staffs the team, a prompt engineer, a continuous-improvement loop, absorbed skill-sets (an elite Design Excellence canon with its own design-review gate, a parallel-orchestration/delivery protocol, a capability-first handover doctrine that automates or hands off to Cowork rather than dumping manual chores on the user, a self-governance succession protocol — decision rights, autonomy levels, post-convergence stewardship — that keeps the team running without a human lead, and an ECC-absorbed evidence canon: a Verification Protocol with executable gates and READY/NOT-READY verdicts, context/memory discipline with confidence-scored instincts, and an agentic-security threat model), guardrail hooks that block git-gate bypasses and lint-config weakening, and the ability to upgrade its own models and roster.
